warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
5 Hindu Push Ups
10m bear Crawls
10 x Inch Worms
10 Cossack Squats
gymnastics:
EMOM x 3 10 Hollow Rocks (Hold Knee if required - keep your back off the ground)
Pull Up Progression
EMOM x 3
10 x Beat Swing
EMOM x 3
Jump Into Hollow/Arch x 10
EMOM x 3
Bigger Beat Swing - Lean Back to begin Pull
Big Hip Pop
Singles - Focus on Pulling into the bar and pushing away
EMOM x 5
Jumping C2B - Pause at the bar and slow lower
- Maintain Hollow - Pull Ribs into hips
HSPU Progression
EMOM x 5
30 second HS Hold
EMOM x 3
Tripod - Lower to Target / Eccentric/ Abmat if required
E2MOM x 5
5 SHSPU Box Pike Or Pike - Aim for target
Core tight throughout

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today hammers vertical push/pull and quads; horizontal back and posterior chain work balances load without compounding fatigue.

5 HSPU
10 C2B
15 Air squats
siri_text: Thursday's workout. Gymnastics: Hollow Rocks. Metcon: Rounds for Time: 5 HSPU, 10 C2B, 15 Air squats. For hypertrophy, focus on back (horizontal), hamstrings, glutes.
